CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2020 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2019 Set For Case Management Conference On Feb-19-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher Evans, T:415.513.3020, defendant appearing on his own behalf;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court allowed Mr. Evans to discuss the case. Mr. Evans confirms that the plaintiff served him with the complaint and the motion for summary judgment. After the hearing, the Court adopts its tentative ruling, as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

The Court signed the proposed order included with the moving papers.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2019 Set For Trial On Nov-18-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
